---
title: "Joseph Dante Maurice"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/headshot.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jdantemaurice@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joseph-dante-maurice-68a56526a

---

Hello! I am Joseph Dante Maurice, a senior at Rice University. I am pursuing a double major in Sport Analytics and Statistics and a minor in Data Science. Driven by determination to work in sports, I transferred to Rice after two years at the University of Wisconsin–Madison to focus on sports analytics opportunities that align with my career goals.

I currently serve as the Student Assistant Director of Analytics for Rice Baseball. In this role, I capture and analyze data to support player development initiatives, conduct advanced research, and produce detailed scouting reports. My goal is to bring value to a professional sports organization by providing actionable insight through research and analytics.
